key.name: accent-color
key.description: The accent color to use (blue, teal, green, yellow, orange, red, pink, purple, slate, wallpaper)

key.name: background-uri
key.description: URI of the background image. If empty, uses the default shell background.

key.name: last-user
key.description: Username of the last account that logged in, preselected in the user picker.
